productDisplayName: Nike Men Nike Lunareli +2 Black Sports Shoes
description: SHAPED FOR YOUR EVERY STRIDEIncredibly lightweight with a smooth transition, the nike LunarElite+2 model of shoes are designed for those who love to run. Without sacrificing on cushioning and shock absorption, the nike LunarElite+2 shoe is designed in such a manner that it adapts to your stride – be it long or short. Great deal for underpronators and overpronatorsThe Nike LunarElite+2 is specially engineered for runners with underpronated to moderately overpronated gait. Underpronated and overpronated runners strike the ground at the lateral side of the heel. As the individual transfers weight from the heel to the metatarsus, the foot doesn’t roll enough in the medial (inside) direction for overpronators and in the lateral (outside) direction for underpronators, which could affect the knee as the foot doesn’t absorb shock properly. However, the difference lies in the fact that in an underpronator, the ankles do not experience much motion and are rigid, while in an overpronator, the ankles roll inwards making one fall forward easily. Nike realized that it had the responsibility to create the right running shoes that could cater to both underpronators and overpronators, with ample support on both, the lateral and medial sides. This responsibility that it took up resulted in the creation of the Nike LunarElite+ model of shoes.360 degrees of comfortWithout sacrificing on cushioning, the Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes was created with ultra-light, yet ultra-strong Flywire upper. The Flywire is a lightweight support system that is made of tensile fibres that are joined together to create a foundation to construct the upper material of the shoe. It acts like a super strong synthetic ligament, wrapping around the foot and supporting it precisely where it needs that extra support, mapping the foot morphology like an X-ray. Flywire acts like the second skin giving the runner that ultimate freedom and strength in moving backwards, forwards, sideways, up and down. Think of the direction and Nike LunarElite+ shoes will help you move that way with complete convenience, locking your foot down.This range of shoes is created with open mesh uppers with strategic overlays for enhanced support at targeted areas of the upper foot to enhance performance, comfort and breathability. The no-sew design employed in key zones ensure proper fitting and enhance comfort.To add to this snug Fit of the upper is the Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that adds on a plush cushioning to absorb shock protecting the feet, besides adding that extra spring in gait. The dynamic support system adapts to the runner’s stride, adding that specific support to every phase of the run.Ultimate in protectionBesides, Nike LunarElite+ shoes are engineered with a dual layer Ortholite insole that is strong and breathable, replete with anti-microbial foam, making this model of shoes ideal for athletes. The cushioned sockliner is made of long lasting material and adds an exceptional step-in feel, while the memory foam at the collar ensures absolute comfort and fit.The Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes are made of environmentally preferred rubber and employ a modified waffle outsole that makes the shoes durable and multi-surface tractional. The heel unit is made of highly durable carbon rubber, reducing wear and tear, while the flex grooves enhance flexibility, ensuring a smooth and efficient Nike run.Upper Mesh upper for maximum breathability and lightweight comfort Meshed bootie for added ventilation and to provide a snug, cushioned fit Synthetic overlays for midfoot support and added shoe structure Flywire technology on the upper for lightweight structure to the upper and to enhance shoe durability Swoosh overlays on the ankles for style Lace-up system for snug, customised fit Cushioned and meshed collar and tongue for added comfort and snug fit Midsole Lunarlon midsole for ample cushioning, impact protection and lightweight comfort Dynamic Support in the heel for a cushioned heel-strike and toe-off Fitsole footbed with perforations on the midfoot for enhnaced cushioning, customised fit, added support to the heel and breathability Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole for durability Waffle pattern lugs in the forefoot and midfoot periphery for maximum grip and traction BRS 1000 rubber used in the heel for drag protection and enhanced shoe life Scooped heel for better impact protection Nike+ unit for use of compatible devices Outsole extended onto the upper as a toe guard for better forefoot protection Shoe careBrush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
